originalTitle: This stock-market strategy has cheap exposure to AI and points to an advantage for closed-end funds
summary: The fund is diversified and has been an excellent performer, highlighting the advantages of a closed-end structure.
content: The fund is diversified and has been an excellent performer, highlighting the advantages of a closed-end structure.
chineseTitle: 这种股票市场策略对 AI 的投资成本较低，并为封闭式基金带来了优势
chineseSummary: 该基金多元化且表现出色，凸显了封闭式结构的优势。
chineseContent: 该基金多元化且表现出色，凸显了封闭式结构的优势。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
